landing.heroSubtitle: Your personal numerology map reveals who you truly are, your life path, and the energies that guide your destiny.

landing.feature1Desc: Calculation of Destiny, Self, Soul, Personality, Quintessence and Life Cycles according to classic Pythagorean numerology.

landing.feature4Desc: Discover the energies of the current year and month to make conscious decisions.
landing.feature5Desc: Find the most auspicious dates for your goals: interviews, signings, new beginnings.

onboarding.datingSubtitle: Numerological dating connects people through the deep affinity of numbers
onboarding.datingWhatDesc: A system that calculates real compatibility between people by analyzing their core numbers: Life Path, Destiny, Soul, Personality and Personal Year. Not based on looks — based on the deep essence of who you are.
onboarding.datingHowDesc: Your profile is shown to the most numerologically compatible users. You see an affinity score, shared numbers and can start a chat. Only highly compatible people can contact you.
onboarding.datingPotentialDesc: Authentic connections based on the soul, not appearance. Discover who truly completes you on a vibrational level.
onboarding.photosDatingNote: If you activate dating, your photos will also be visible on your dating profile. You can change this at any time from your profile.
onboarding.datingPhotosNote: The photos uploaded in the previous step will be visible on your dating profile.
onboarding.datingBioPlaceholder: Tell us something about yourself... your passions, what you're looking for, what makes you unique.
onboarding.datingSettingsEditable: These settings can be changed at any time from your profile.
onboarding.datingEnable: Yes, I want to find my Soulmate
onboarding.tellUsDesc: Your data is essential for calculating your numerology map
onboarding.residenceState: Region or city where you live
onboarding.photosDesc: Photos allow us to provide you with daily personalized outfit suggestions based on your physical appearance, complexion and build. <1>You can upload them later</1> from your profile.
onboarding.photosTip: 💡 <1>Tip:</1> upload full-body photos and even swimwear shots to get more precise outfit suggestions based on your real body type.
onboarding.photosPrivacy: Photos are private and visible only to you. They will be used exclusively to generate tailored outfit suggestions.
onboarding.photosOptionalNote: ⏭️ You can skip this step and upload photos later from your profile.
onboarding.confirmDesc: Verify everything is correct before proceeding
onboarding.profileCompleteDesc: You can now generate your numerology map.
onboarding.ageRestriction: You must be at least 18 years old to register
onboarding.stateRequired: Enter the region or city where you live

profile.photosDesc: Update your photos for more precise outfit suggestions
profile.extraPhotosDesc:
Upload photos in different contexts for more accurate outfits: summer and winter shots, close-ups showing your eye color, profile and full views, and even swimwear to highlight your body shape. The more variety you upload, the better the AI can suggest the perfect look for you.
IMPORTANT: Only you should be in the photo; no other faces or bodies should be visible in the foreground.
profile.photosPrivacyNote: 🔒 All uploaded photos and generated outfits are private and visible only to you. They will never be made public. You can delete them at any time.
profile.deletePhotoConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this photo?
profile.regenerateMapDesc: If you've modified your data, you can regenerate your numerology map to get updated calculations.

hero.badge: The only platform that combines Numerology and Dating
hero.subtitle1: Dating apps show you a photo. We show you who you are truly compatible with, calculated from your birth date.
hero.subtitle2: Pythagorean Numerology applied to love: 6 compatibility dimensions, authentic profiles, no swipe algorithm.

pain.label: The problem with dating apps
pain.title: Does this sound familiar?
pain.subtitle: Millions of people spend hours swiping every day, but real connections are extremely rare.
pain.p1Desc: You spend hours scrolling through profiles, liking, waiting. Most matches never reply.
pain.p2Desc: Retouched photos, made-up bios, people completely different in real life. The first date is always a bitter surprise.
pain.p3Desc: The algorithm shows you who is nearby or who liked you. Not who is truly compatible with your deep personality.
pain.resultDesc: Years lost on apps that treat you like merchandise. Deep connections are not found by scrolling photos — they are found by understanding who you truly are and who vibrates at your same frequency.

solution.label: Our solution
solution.title: True compatibility is
solution.subtitle: Pythagorean Numerology reveals the deep structure of your personality from your birth date. By crossing your numbers with those of other users, we calculate real compatibility across 6 dimensions.
solution.d2Desc: What do you both seek emotionally and internally?
solution.d3Desc: How do others see you and how do you present yourself to the world?
solution.d4Desc: Are you in the same life phase right now?
solution.d5Desc: What lessons do you carry and how do they integrate?
solution.d6Desc: Are your talents and communication styles complementary?
solution.cardInsight: Both number 7 — a rare harmony. The search for deep meaning unites you.

howItWorks.title: Three steps toward
howItWorks.s1Desc: Enter your birth date and discover all your numbers: Destiny, Soul, Personality, Karma and Expression.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Our numerological algorithm analyzes all registered users and shows you who is most compatible across 6 dimensions.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Chat with your real matches. No swipes, no dark algorithms — just authentic compatibility.

daily.f1Desc: Every day has its energy. We tell you what yours is today.
daily.f2Desc: We suggest which colors to use based on your day's vibration.

about.title: Who
about.p1: My name is Renato R. and I have always studied hidden patterns that influence reality, with a strong interest in numerology, quantum physics and computer science. My goal is to combine ancient approaches and modern logic to create tools that are genuinely useful in everyday life.
about.p2: Over the years I have developed this system to make numerology clearer, more accessible and concrete: not abstract theory, but practical guidance you can use every day — including finding people who are truly compatible with you.
about.p3: Unlike generic horoscopes, every analysis is calculated from your birth date and full name, following the principles of the Pythagorean tradition. The result is a reading that does not just describe you, but helps you understand how to act, choose and — why not — love better.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.t1Text: I had spent two years on Tinder without a serious relationship. Here in three weeks I found someone I can talk to for hours. The 91% compatibility does not lie.
testimonials.t2Text: I did not believe in numerology. Then I saw my map and realized it perfectly described what I was looking for in a relationship. Incredible.
testimonials.t3Text: The Soulmates section opened my eyes to who I am and what I am really looking for. It is not just about dating — it is about knowing yourself.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.a1: Pythagorean numerology is a millenary system of self-knowledge. Our users are constantly surprised by the precision of the analyses. We invite you to try it for free and judge for yourself.
faq.a2: We calculate 6 key numbers from your birth date (Destiny, Soul, Personality, Karma, Expression, Personal Year) and compare them with those of other users. The result is a real compatibility score, not a swipe algorithm.
faq.a3: Yes. All profiles are real users registered on the platform. During the Beta phase there are also some demonstration profiles, clearly indicated, to show you how compatibility works before the community grows.
faq.a4: You can start for free without entering payment details. The first analysis and the basic Soulmates section are completely free. Premium content is unlocked with a subscription.
faq.a5: Absolutely. We use advanced encryption and never share your data with third parties. Data is protected under European GDPR regulations.
faq.q6: How is it different from horoscopes?
faq.a6: Horoscopes are generic and based only on the zodiac sign. Pythagorean numerology uses your exact birth date to calculate unique and personal numbers. The analysis is tailored, not valid for millions of people born in the same month.
faq.a7: Of course. No strings attached. You can delete your account and all data at any time from your profile settings.
